name: MESENTERIC FIBROMATOSIS
definition: INTRAABDOMINAL FIBROMATOSIS = ABDOMINAL DESMOID part of the spectrum of deep fibromatosis

demographics.Path: nonencapsulated well-circumscribed mass ± infiltrative margins within muscularis
demographics.Histo: uniform wavy spindle-shaped fibroblasts in a typically uninflamed abundant dense
demographics.Associated with: Gardner subtype of familial adenomatous polyposis (in 5-13%)

discriminating_features: distorted thickened / effaced small bowel folds
homogeneous soft-tissue attenuation ← highly collagenous stroma similar to skeletal

general: distorted thickened / effaced small bowel folds
US: solid well-circumscribed heterogeneous mass with variable internal echogenicity
CT: homogeneous soft-tissue attenuation ← highly collagenous stroma similar to skeletal
striated / whorled appearance ← alternating collagenous + myxoid areas
CECT: similar / greater enhancement compared to muscle in fibrous lesion
MR: hypo- or isointense signal compared to muscle on T1WI
heterogeneously intermediate / high SI on T2WI ← depending on cellularity + amount of

clinical.Cx: gastrointestinal bleeding, small bowel obstruction, fistula formation, bowel perforation
clinical.Rx: wide surgical excision, less radical surgery / medical therapy with antiestrogens /
